case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. THOMAS, JOHN

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, JOHN $2,853.64 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,951.64
